ul.li:
Action:
Scan Metadata for all matching IDs.
Filter storage subset.
Brute-force Distance on subset.

Action:
HNSW search with oversampling (k * factor).
Evaluate Predicate on result set.
Re-rank/Fill until k matches found.

div.p: Pre-Filter (S > 0.3): When many vectors match, narrowing the pool first is computationally cheaper.
Post-Filter (S <= 0.3): When few vectors match, Pre-filtering breaks HNSW graph navigability. Better to search broadly and trim.
